prose: Fukui reactivity indices for phenol computed at DFT tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, PySCF) in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Finite-difference Mulliken charges used; N+1 (anion, charge −1, mult 2) and N−1 (cation, charge +1, mult 2) states computed alongside neutral. Most electrophilic site: C3 (f⁺ = 2.1028319). Most nucleophilic site: O1 (f⁻ = 0.16201477). The ortho/para carbons (C3, C4, C7) show the highest f⁺ values, consistent with electrophilic aromatic substitution directing by the hydroxyl group. Dual descriptor also confirms C3, C4, C7 as electrophile-preferred sites and O as the dominant nucleophilic site. All integrity checks passed (fukui_charge_conservation_f+ and f− both sum to 1.0000; schema_header present). No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy=true.
